description: This legendary Chinese Pokémon is considered magnificent. Many people are enchanted by its grand mane.
name: Arcanine

description: When it plays in water, it rolls up its elongated ears to prevent their insides from getting wet.

attacks.name: Bubblebeam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Azumarill

description: With its acute hearing, it can pick up sounds from far away. It usually hides in quiet places.

attacks.name: Fairy Power
attacks.effect: Return 1 of your Pokémon and all cards attached to it to your hand.

name: Clefable

description: Once it appears, it goes on a rampage. It remains enraged until it demolishes everything around it.

attacks.name: Hyper Beam
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Gyarados

description: It launches kicks while spinning. If it spins at high speed, it may bore its way into the ground.

attacks.name: Triple Kick
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Close Combat
attacks.effect: During your opponent’s next turn, any damage done to Hitmontop by attacks is increased by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Hitmontop

description: Once it catches the wind, it deftly controls its cotton-puff spores—it can even float around the world.

attacks.name: Mass Attack
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage times the number of Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent’s).

attacks.name: Leaf Guard
attacks.effect: During your opponent’s next turn, any damage done to Jumpluff by attacks is reduced by 30 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Jumpluff

description: Its nine beautiful tails are filled with a wondrous energy that could keep it alive for 1,000 years.

abilities.name: Roast Reveal
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard a Fire Energy card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards. This power can’t be used if Ninetales is affected by a Special Condition.

name: Ninetales

description: Its eyes are specially adapted. They concentrate even faint light and enable it to see in the dark.

abilities.name: Night Sight
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may draw a card. This power can’t be used if Noctowl is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Extrasensory
attacks.effect: If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, this attack does 40 damage plus 40 more damage.

name: Noctowl

description: Due to its relaxed and carefree attitude, it often bumps its head on boulders and boat hulls as it swims.

attacks.name: Muddy Water
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Quagsire

description: If the electric pouches in its cheeks become fully charged, both ears will stand straight up.

attacks.name: Iron Tail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Thunderbolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy attached to Raichu.

name: Raichu

description: The berries it stores in its vase-like shell decompose and become a gooey liquid.

abilities.name: Shell Barricade
abilities.effect: As long as Shuckle is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to Shuckle by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Poison Jab
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Shuckle

description: It has incredible intellect and intuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.

abilities.name: Second Sight
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may look at the top 3 cards of either player’s deck and put them back on top of that player’s deck in any order. This power can’t be used if Slowking is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Psyshock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Slowking

description: It hates light and shock. If attacked, it inflates its body to build up its counterstrike.

attacks.name: Double Return
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage times the number of damage counters on Wobbuffet.

name: Wobbuffet

description: The tail’s tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people.

attacks.name: Acceleration Bolt
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 basic Energy cards and attach them to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Thunder
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, Ampharos does 20 damage to itself.

name: Ampharos

description: It spins string not only from its rear but also from its mouth. It’s hard to tell which end is which.

attacks.name: Leech Life
attacks.effect: Remove from Ariados the number of damage counters equal to the damage you did to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Poisonous Saliva
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Ariados

description: Water-repellent powder on its wings enables it to collect honey, even in the heaviest of rains.

attacks.name: Cure Powder
attacks.effect: Remove 3 damage counters from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Whirlwind
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

name: Butterfree

description: Because of its unusual, star-like silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.

abilities.name: Sweet Sleeping Face
abilities.effect: As long as Cleffa is Asleep, prevent all damage done to Cleffa by attacks.

attacks.name: Eeeeeeek
attacks.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck, then draw 6 cards. Cleffa is now Asleep.

name: Cleffa

description: If a head drops off, it emits a telepathic call in search of others to form an Exeggcute cluster.

attacks.name: Energy Absorption
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for up to 2 Energy cards and attach them to Exeggutor.

attacks.name: Big Eggsplosion
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to Exeggutor. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

name: Exeggutor

description: If it eats the plant stalk it carries as emergency rations, it runs off in search of a new stalk.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Spin Turn
attacks.effect: Switch Farfetch’d with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Farfetch’d

description: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.

attacks.name: Spinning Tail
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent’s Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Feraligatr

description: It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other Pokémon to enter.

attacks.name: Find a Friend
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Pokémon, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Quick Blow
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Furret

description: Because its fangs are too heavy, it always keeps its head tilted down. However, its bite is powerful.

attacks.name: Timid Tackle
attacks.effect: Granbull does 20 damage to itself. Switch Granbull with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Chomp
attacks.effect: Does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Granbull.

name: Granbull

description: Always holding a pendulum that it swings at a steady rhythm, it causes drowsiness in anyone nearby.

abilities.name: Sleep Pendulum
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep. This power can’t be used if Hypno is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Psychic Shot
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Hypno

description: They have gentle hearts. Because they rarely fight, many have been caught. Their number has dwindled.

attacks.name: Ice Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Ice Blade
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Lapras

description: The spot patterns on its back grow larger or smaller depending on the number of stars in the night sky.

attacks.name: Quick Draw
attacks.effect: Draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.effect: This attack’s damage isn’t affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

name: Ledian

description: Meganium’s breath has the power to revive dead grass and plants. It can make them healthy again.

attacks.name: Sleep Powder
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Giant Bloom
attacks.effect: Remove 2 damage counters from Meganium.

name: Meganium

description: Its lithe muscles allow it to walk without making a sound. It attacks in an instant.

attacks.name: Sharpen Claws
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, discard a card from your opponent’s hand without looking.

attacks.name: Sneaky Attack
attacks.effect: If Persian has any Darkness Energy attached to it, this attack does 30 damage plus 30 more damage.

name: Persian

description: Despite its small size, it can zap even adult humans. However, if it does so, it also surprises itself.

abilities.name: Sweet Sleeping Face
abilities.effect: As long as Pichu is Asleep, prevent all damage done to Pichu by attacks.

attacks.name: Playground
attacks.effect: Each player may search his or her deck for as many Basic Pokémon as he or she likes, put them onto his or her Bench, and shuffle his or her deck afterward. (You put your Pokémon on the Bench first.) Pichu is now Asleep.

name: Pichu

description: If it digs at an incredible pace, it may snap off its spike and claws. They grow back in a day.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

name: Sandslash

description: Its lips are the most sensitive part of its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things.

abilities.name: Sweet Sleeping Face
abilities.effect: As long as Smoochum is Asleep, prevent all damage done to Smoochum by attacks.

attacks.name: Energy Antics
attacks.effect: Move an Energy card attached to 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon to another of your opponent’s Pokémon. Smoochum is now Asleep.

name: Smoochum

description: It converts sunlight into energy. In the darkness after sunset, it closes its petals and becomes still.

abilities.name: Sunshine Grace
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for a Grass Pokémon, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. This power can’t be used if Sunflora is affected by a Special Condition.

name: Sunflora

description: It has a secret, devastating move. It rubs its blazing fur together to cause huge explosions.

attacks.name: Fire Spin
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy attached to Typhlosion.

name: Typhlosion

description: Even though it is small, it can’t be ignored because it will slug any handy target without warning.

abilities.name: Sweet Sleeping Face
abilities.effect: As long as Tyrogue is Asleep, prevent all damage done to Tyrogue by attacks.

attacks.name: Mischievous Punch
attacks.effect: This attack’s damage isn’t affected by Weakness or Resistance. Tyrogue is now Asleep.

name: Tyrogue

attacks.name: Super Poison Breath
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Super Explosion
attacks.effect: Weezing does 90 damage to itself, and don’t apply Weakness to this damage.

name: Weezing

attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for an Energy card and attach it to Blissey.

attacks.name: Double-edge
attacks.effect: Blissey does 40 damage to itself.

name: Blissey

attacks.effect: Discard a Water Energy attached to Corsola and remove all damage counters from Corsola.

attacks.name: Hyper Cannon
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 50 more damage.

name: Corsola

attacks.name: Big Bite
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can’t retreat during your opponent’s next turn.

name: Croconaw

description: It nests at the edge of sharp cliffs. It spends all day carrying food to its awaiting chicks.

attacks.name: Snowy Present
attacks.effect: Draw a card for each Water Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent’s Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Delibird

attacks.effect: This attack’s damage isn’t affected by Resistance.

attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 70 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.effect: Return Dunsparce and all cards attached to it to your hand.

attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Flaaffy

attacks.name: Green Draw
attacks.effect: Draw a card for each of your Grass Pokémon in play.

attacks.name: Double Headbutt
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads.

name: Heracross

abilities.name: Sweet Sleeping Face
abilities.effect: As long as Igglybuff is Asleep, prevent all damage done to Igglybuff by attacks.

attacks.effect: Igglybuff is now Asleep. During your opponent’s next turn, the attack cost of each of the Defending Pokémon’s attacks is Colorless more.

attacks.effect: Mantine can’t attack during your next turn.

abilities.effect: Each of your Grass Pokémon has no Weakness.

name: Metapod

description: If it is around babies, the milk it produces contains much more nutrition than usual.

attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Moomoo Milk card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Body Slam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Miltank

attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep. Remove 4 damage counters from Parasect.

name: Parasect

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to Quilava.

name: Quilava

attacks.name: Offensive Needle
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Knock Away
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage.

attacks.name: Big Yawn

attacks.name: Madkinesis
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage plus 20 more damage for each Psychic Energy attached to Slowbro.

description: The middle section of its body is called the core. It glows in a different color each time it is seen.

attacks.name: Cosmic Cyclone
attacks.effect: Choose as many Water Energy attached to your Pokémon as you like. This attack does 20 damage times the amount of Energy you chose. Shuffle those cards back into your deck.

abilities.name: RETURN
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you put Unown from your hand onto your Bench, you may return all Energy attached to 1 of your Pokémon to your hand.

name: Unown

description: Its flat, thin body is always stuck on walls. Its shape appears to have some meaning.

abilities.name: FLASH
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you put Unown from your hand onto your Bench, you may look at the top 5 cards of your deck and put them back on top of your deck in any order.

name: Unown

description: It has a very fine fur. Take care not to make it angry, or it may inflate steadily and hit with a Body Slam.

attacks.name: Double Slap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.effect: During your opponent’s next turn, any damage done to Wigglytuff by attacks is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

description: Its feet have suction cups designed to stick to any surface. It tenaciously climbs trees to forage.
name: Caterpie

description: It walks carefully to prevent its egg from breaking. However, it is extremely fast at running away.

attacks.name: Happy Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, remove 3 damage counters from Chansey.

name: Chansey

description: Its pleasantly aromatic leaf has the ability to check the humidity and temperature.
name: Chikorita

description: The moonlight that it stores in the wings on its back apparently gives it the ability to float in midair.

attacks.name: Minimize
attacks.effect: During your opponent’s next turn, any damage done to Clefairy by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Clefairy

description: It usually stays hunched over. If it is angry or surprised, it shoots flames out of its back.
name: Cyndaquil

description: It remembers every dream it eats. It rarely eats the dreams of adults because children’s are much tastier.

attacks.name: Sleep Inducer
attacks.effect: Switch the Defending Pokémon with 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon. The new Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Continuous Eggsplosion
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Exeggcute

attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 basic Energy cards, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Girafarig

description: It has a brave and trustworthy nature. It fearlessly stands up to bigger and stronger foes.
name: Growlithe

description: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.

attacks.name: Hypnosis
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Hoothoot

description: To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. But they do enjoy gentle breezes.

attacks.name: Bounce
attacks.effect: You may switch Hoppip with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hypnoblast
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Jigglypuff

description: It rocks its body rhythmically. It appears to alter the rhythm depending on how it is feeling.

attacks.name: Lick
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Comet Punch
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Ledyba

description: For no reason, it jumps and splashes about, making it easy for predators like Pidgeotto to catch it mid-jump.
name: Magikarp

description: If static electricity builds in its body, its fleece doubles in volume. Touching it will shock you.

name: Mareep

attacks.name: Water Splash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

description: It loves anything that shines. It especially adores coins that it picks up and secretly hoards.

name: Phanpy

description: It raises its tail to check its surroundings. The tail is sometimes struck by lightning in this pose.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage.

name: Pikachu

attacks.name: Defense Curl
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to Sandshrew by attacks during your opponent’s next turn.

attacks.effect: Look at your opponent’s hand.

name: Sentret

description: It lazes vacantly near water. If something bites its tail, it won’t even notice for a whole day.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

description: It has an active, playful nature. Many women like to frolic with it because of its affectionate ways.

attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

description: It lies still in the same pose for days in its web, waiting for its unsuspecting prey to wander close.

name: Spinarak

description: At night, the center of its body slowly flickers with the same rhythm as a human heartbeat.
name: Staryu

description: It may plummet from the sky. If attacked by a Spearow, it will violently shake its leaves.

attacks.name: Cure Kernels
attacks.effect: Remove 2 damage counters from 1 of your Pokémon.

name: Sunkern

description: Its powerful, well-developed jaws are capable of crushing anything. Even its trainer must be careful.
name: Totodile

description: If it is attacked by an enemy that is stronger than itself, it feigns injury to fool the enemy and escapes.

name: Vulpix

description: When it walks around on the ground, it coats its body with a slimy, poisonous film.

attacks.name: Tail Whip
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can’t attack during your opponent’s next turn.

effect: Choose 1 of your Pokémon. Flip 2 coins. For each heads, remove 3 damage counters from that Pokémon.

name: Professor Elm’s Training Method

effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards.

effect: Switch 1 of your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
name: Switch

effect: Double Colorless Energy provides Colorless Colorless Energy
name: Double Colorless Energy

When you attach this card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon, put 1 damage counter on that Pokémon. (While not in play, Rainbow Energy counts as Colorless Energy.)
name: Rainbow Energy

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 damage plus 40 more damage. If tails, discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

abilities.name: Rain Dance
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a Water Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Water Pokémon. This power can’t be used if Feraligatr is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Hydro Crunch
attacks.effect: Does 60 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

abilities.name: Leaf Trans
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move a Grass Energy attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon. This power can’t be used if Meganium is affected by a Special Condition.

abilities.name: Afterburner
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your discard pile for a Fire Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. If you do, put 1 damage counter on that Pokémon. This power can’t be used if Typhlosion is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Flare Destroy
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy card attached to Typhlosion and discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

description: Legends claim this Pokémon flies the world’s skies continuously on its magnificent, seven-colored wings.

abilities.name: Sacred Rainbow
abilities.effect: All Energy attached to Ho-Oh LEGEND are Fire Energy instead of their usual type.

attacks.name: Bright Wing
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to Ho-Oh LEGEND.

description: It is said to be the guardian of the seas. It is rumored to have been seen on the night of a storm.

abilities.name: Ocean Grow
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you put Lugia LEGEND into play, you may look at the top 5 cards of your deck and attach all Energy cards you find there to Lugia LEGEND. Discard the other cards.

attacks.name: Elemental Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy, Water Energy, and Lightning Energy attached to Lugia LEGEND.

description: They say that during past strife, Gyarados would appear and leave blazing ruins in its wake.

attacks.name: Thrash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage. If tails, Gyarados does 20 damage to itself.
